quotes: Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.

rules.intent: Ensure typographic accessibility and legibility across all digital contexts.
rules.rule_text: Body copy must be 16px or larger (type_scale.body.size = 16px) with a line height of at least 150% (body.line_height = 150%), using a defined type scale to maintain clear visual hierarchy.

quotes: Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.

rules.intent: Prevent barrier creation in interactive designs by enforcing WCAG-aligned contrast, input, and touch target standards.
rules.rule_text: Ensure robust visual usability: always test contrast; never rely on color alone to convey meaning; verify all text is legible. For forms, labels must remain permanently visible (no disappearing labels or placeholder-as-label styling). All interactive click/tap targets must have a minimum dimension of 48px (dimension.accessibility.touch_target_min = 48px).

quotes: Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop. **[GENERAL email]:** animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.

rules.intent: Maintain email functional compatibility on restrictive clients and protect users sensitive to motion.
rules.rule_text: Keep animation transitions quick and unintrusive, avoiding excessive motion and providing a way to pause effects. Specifically in emails, animated GIFs must convey the core key message in the very first frame to accommodate clients like Outlook, and must not autoplay motion for more than ~5 seconds without a static fallback.

quotes: Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.

rules.intent: Meet regulatory accessibility compliance standards for non-text content.
rules.rule_text: All images must carry descriptive alt text. Video and audio assets must provide accompanying transcripts, ensuring full alignment with the WCAG standard.
